title: CertOps Signed Job Payload (STUB)
description: STUB frozen in Phase 0. This freezes only the signing and replay-protection envelope so M2 (executor) and M4 (agent) can build against a stable outer shape. The per-job-type body (renew, deploy, reload, revoke) is intentionally left open (additionalProperties: true) and is specified in M2/M4. The signature covers the full payload excluding the signature field itself, using the control-plane Ed25519 platform operational signing key. This key is never used for certificate issuance or customer key custody.

jobId.description: Unique job identifier. Part of the replay-protection tuple.

attemptId.description: Per-dispatch attempt identifier for idempotent retries.

type.description: Job kind. The matching body shape is defined in M2/M4.

agentId.description: Target agent id, or null when dispatched via selector.

agentSelector.description: Optional selector when not targeting a single agent id.

expiresAt.description: Hard validity bound. Agents MUST reject jobs outside this window (clock-drift aware).

nonce.description: Single-use nonce. Agents maintain a bounded replay cache keyed by nonce + jobId.

signingKeyId.description: Identifier of the control-plane Ed25519 signing key the agent pins.

signature.description: Base64 Ed25519 signature over the canonical payload excluding this field. HMAC is not accepted.
